nasb.text: Then Enosh lived eight hundred and fifteen years after he became the father of Kenan, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: Enosh lived after he fathered Kenan 815 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 以挪士生該南以後，還活了八百一十五年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了八百一十五年，生儿育女，

csbs.text: 以挪士生了该南之后，又活了八百一十五年，并且生了其他的儿女。
